problem-framing 1 open comment
OverviewEvidenceHypothesesDecisionsExperimentReview
Decision needed

Approve a reversible experiment for release-status questions

Test a plain-language status response before building a dashboard.

Review proposed experiment →
Original request
Build us a dashboard that shows the deployment status of every application.
Requester
Engineering leadership
Proposed solution
Central deployment dashboard
Current problem frame
problem-001

Billing and payments support

Situation

Responding to customers waiting for a fix

Difficulty

Existing deployment state requires developer interpretation

Consequence

Customer responses are delayed and engineering is interrupted

Inspect hypothesis →
Key evidence

What currently supports the frame

Inspect all evidence →
evidence-001

Support asks engineering whether a customer fix is live before replying.

Limitations
  • One participant
  • Frequency is not established
evidence-002

A developer checked both CI and runtime deployment state to answer one request.

Limitations
  • One observed request
